name: "🚀 Feature Request"
title: "[FEAT]: "
description: "Propose a new feature or user-facing functionality."
labels: ["type:feature"]
---

### Goal
<!-- A one-sentence description of WHY this feature is important and what value it adds. -->
<!-- Example: To allow teachers to see an overview of their active chats. -->


### To-Do List
<!-- A checklist of the specific, atomic steps required to complete the task. -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 


### Acceptance Criteria
<!-- A clear, testable "Definition of Done." How will we know this is working correctly? -->
<!-- Example: A logged-in "Teacher" can navigate to a Dashboard page that displays a list of their chats. -->
